sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43526" key="eu)/bwlos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὔβωλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">βῶλον</etym>) <sense id="n43526.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fertile</tr_> (v. sub <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">εὔπωλος</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
